description:
The Open Source Alternative To Notion.

AppFlowy is an open source alternative to Notion.
You are in charge of your data and customizations.
Version 0.11.6 – 01/04/2026
Desktop
Bug Fixes
- Fixed notification refresh timing to improve performance
- Fixed potential failure when importing Notion zip files
- Fixed potential data corruption issue for documents
Mobile
Bug Fixes
- Fixed notification refresh timing to improve performance
- Fixed potential data corruption issue for documents
